description: A production supervisor needs to certify that an operator is now qualified to run a specific complex process after completing their training.

nodes.task_description: Look up the operator in the training management system.
Verify that the operator has completed all required training modules for the process.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms all prerequisite training is complete.

nodes.task_description: Update the operator's profile to add the 'Reactor Unit 2 Operator' qualification.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the operator's qualifications, allowing them to be scheduled for that work.
